voice_signature: Sensory-dense mythic prose anchored in color/heat metaphors. Rhythmic parallelism using triad structures. High-mythic vocabulary spikes in pivotal transitions. Melancholic wonder.

north_stars.description: The light-absorbing cloak in the gold field.
The trees lit on fire establish the color-anchor.
